milestones.title: Initial Movement
milestones.description: The player takes control of the character 'Baba' and begins moving around the starting area to assess the puzzle layout and available text blocks.

milestones.title: Rule Break: Wall is Stop
milestones.description: The player pushes the 'STOP' text block away from the phrase 'WALL IS STOP'. This critical puzzle-solving step deactivates the collision rule for walls, allowing objects to pass through them.

milestones.title: Crossing the Obstacle
milestones.description: Taking advantage of the broken rule, the player moves Baba directly through the wall tiles that were previously impassable.

milestones.title: Create Winning Condition
milestones.description: The player creates a winning condition by moving Baba to push the blocks of 'FLAG/ROCK/BABA', 'IS' and 'WIN' to create the rule 'FLAG/ROCK/BABA IS WIN'.

milestones.title: Level Completion
milestones.description: The player moves Baba onto the 'FLAG/ROCK/BABA' object. Because the rule 'FLAG/ROCK/BABA IS WIN' is active, this triggers the victory condition, resulting in the 'CONGRATULATIONS!' screen.
